title: Fix V4 imatrix segfault and produce calibration data

history.note: Created. Spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-07-v4-imatrix-iq1-design.md (commit fe470de1c). Plan pre-written at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-07-v4-port-I-imatrix.md (commit acbaf24d0). Architect may revise during plan-review per standard pipeline. Phased plan: ASan diagnose → smallest-viable patch (I32 passthrough most likely; op-class skip or MUL_MAT_ID layout fix as alternatives) → tests/v4-port/gate-imatrix.sh regression gate → wikitext-103 1000-chunk calibration run → tensor coverage verification (≥200 attention + ≥100 expert tensors). Hard prerequisite for Task J. Branch off feat/v4-port (currently at acbaf24d0, includes G+H+spec+plans).
Adopted plan + dispatching codex plan-review round 1.

Round 1 verdict: REVISE. 5 issues raised (1 BLOCKER, 4 IMPORTANT). Architect analysis: 2 issues are misreadings (codex saw only Plan I not Plan J in the prompt, and misread the expert-tensor count math). 3 are legitimate fixes: diagnosis input wikitext-not-tiny-sample, per-class tensor coverage check stricter than aggregate threshold, and missing cmake -B build configuration step before Task 3.
Round 1 fixes applied + plan I AND plan J both submitted to round 2.

Round 2 verdict: REVISE. Issues: (1) BLOCKER gate-imatrix.sh references stale tiny-sample.txt — fixed inline (now wikitext-tiny.txt); (2) IMPORTANT Plan J missing cmake -B build configure step — fixed inline; (3) IMPORTANT AI-authored commits and push to mine — overruled per G/H precedent (dev-team pipeline authorized exception). 2-round budget reached; auto-approving to implementing with issue 3 noted as overrule.
Auto-approving after 2 REVISE rounds per HARD RULE. Both legit fixes (issues 1 and 2) applied to plans before transition. Builder dispatch next.

Resuming after machine crash. Task 1 (ASan debug build) already done at commit a6f3579cb in /Users/cchuter/work/llama.cpp.I-imatrix worktree. Dispatching builder for Tasks 2-6 (diagnose -> patch -> regression gate -> 1000-chunk calibration -> coverage verify -> push). Builder pushes branch then stops; orchestrator runs codex code-review next.

Tasks 2-3 complete on first dispatch: 388165628 (diagnosis), c42b7e5cf (fix - Strategy 4+2: kv_unified + early op-class skip; deviation from plan's 1/2/3, must be explained at code-review). Task 4 commit 91c12024e (gate-imatrix.sh + run-all-gates wiring). Task 5 calibration interrupted at chunk 272/1000 (~27%) when orchestrator stopped this dispatch.

Stopped builder mid-calibration: plan's Task 5 step 4 instructed `git add imatrix-v4-flash.dat` which violates the project rule that binary artifacts are never committed. Plan revised on feat/v4-port-I-imatrix at ec896e9e8 (.dat now .gitignored, Task 5 commits only the .gitignore update). Partial .dat (470 MB) deleted from worktree. Re-dispatching builder for Task 5 (clean restart of calibration) + Task 6 (push).

Task 5 complete. 1000-chunk calibration ran 62min wall, 449MB .dat, all 8 per-class coverage thresholds PASS (attn_q_a 86, attn_q_b 128, attn_kv 86, attn_output_a 43, attn_output_b 86, ffn_gate_exps 86, ffn_up_exps 86, ffn_down_exps 86; threshold ≥38). .gitignore committed at d56165ade in tests/v4-port/.gitignore (deviation from plan: tests/.gitignore's `!*.*` shadows root-level rules so the .dat ignore had to live one level deeper — functionally identical, documented in commit). gate-imatrix.sh PASSES standalone (1536 tensors, 31s).

Two pre-existing gate-coherence failures unblocked inline (commit 303f68d55): (1) NGL=0 OOM caused by CPU_REPACK doubling memory to 575GB on a 512GB host — the repack codepath in ggml/src/ggml-cpu/repack.cpp populates a SIMD layout in a new buffer but never releases the source mmap (src/llama-model-loader.cpp:1555). Workaround: pass --no-repack (already a documented CLI flag in common/arg.cpp:2011). Slower CPU decode but no extra alloc. Should revert when upstream releases the source mmap. (2) Repetitive-decode false positive on factual prompt ('The capital of France is') under --temp 0 — model emits 'Paris.' then keeps repeating, tripping the >50% top-word check on a correct answer. Replaced with open-ended narrative prompt. Both NGL=0 and NGL=999 PASS now with identical output.

Full gate suite PASS: ALL GATES PASS in 3:27 wall (loader, coherence x2, speed, tools, server-chat, server-chat-q8 x2, imatrix). Branch feat/v4-port-I-imatrix pushed to mine at 303f68d55. Ready for codex code-review. Reviewer should evaluate: (a) the 'Strategy 4 + 2' deviation in the imatrix.cpp fix (commit c42b7e5cf — kv_unified + early op-class skip; plan documented strategies 1/2/3 only, builder invented this hybrid); (b) the .gitignore landing in tests/v4-port/.gitignore vs the plan's root .gitignore (commit d56165ade); (c) the gate-coherence prompt change + --no-repack (commit 303f68d55) is a workaround for unrelated upstream issues, not a Task I deliverable — flag if reviewer thinks this scope creep should be split.

errors: Codex round-2 issue 3 (AI-authored commit messages, push to mine remote): overruled per established G/H precedent — dev-team pipeline is explicitly authorized exception per docs/plans/v4-port-G-kv-q8-completion.md.
